blocks.text: Status Report: Valuation Analysis for Woods LLC
Prepared by Sandra Perez, Director, Fernhollow Partners LLC, for the {{fact:f:E-2020-001.client}} executive team.

The engagement is on schedule. What changed this period: the draft valuation model cleared second internal review, and the last open data item on the Woods LLC side was resolved and traced to source. What it means: the analytical work is substantially complete, and the remaining effort is drafting, review, and the board readout. What we need from you appears under Upcoming Work.

items: Draft valuation model completed and through second internal review, with income and market approaches reconciled
Briana Dennis completed the draft report structure and the expanded market-approach appendix requested for the board
Ryan Strong finished the comparable-company tie-out; every figure in the model now traces to source
Final open client data item resolved with your controller's office
Full draft report to you for factual review
Final partner review of the model and report before board materials are produced
Board readout deck prepared once factual-review comments are in
Confirmation of the board presentation window

blocks.text: The engagement remains within the fixed fee of {{fact:f:E-2020-001.fee}} set in the engagement letter. No scope changes have been requested or made, and we do not expect any adjustment. Invoicing continues on the monthly schedule.

items: Board calendar: if the presentation window moves, the factual-review period compresses; early confirmation protects the schedule
Late data changes: any restatement of the monthly figures after factual review would require rework of the tie-out
Availability: the review period overlaps client close activities, so we have kept the factual-review packet deliberately short
